name: Freezing Pie Crusts
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out pie dough onto waxed paper, covering it with another sheet of wax paper.
2. Gently fold the dough in half and stack individually wrapped layers (with two sheets of wax paper).
3. Place all the stacked dough pieces into a gallon-sized freezer bag. They will fit diagonally within that size bag.
